<a id="end-to-end-research-systems"></a>
# 🔬 End-to-End Research Systems

> Systems that cover multiple core stages of the research process and aim to complete a relatively full research loop with limited human intervention.

## What belongs here

- the main contribution is a full or near-full AI researcher workflow

## Exclude if

- it mainly solves one subtask, proposes a method, or provides infrastructure
